extendInfo.NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription: Caramba reads media files you place on your Desktop so it can play and transcode them.
extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Caramba reads media files you place in Documents so it can play and transcode them.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: Caramba reads media files you place in Downloads so it can play and transcode them.
extendInfo.NSRemovableVolumesUsageDescription: Caramba reads media files from external drives so it can play and transcode them.
extendInfo.NSNetworkVolumesUsageDescription: Caramba reads media files from network shares so it can play and transcode them.
